response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and geospatial experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, which are core requirements; their C++ exposure is limited to academic/legacy NI LabWindows work, and their GIS work uses DLang and Node.js, not the required stack for routing tiling.
strengths: Strong geospatial project experience via GISCollective and Open Green Map
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and languages
Active open-source contributor with tools for testing and data pipelines
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or tile optimization
Geospatial work uses DLang/Node.js, not the required C++/Linux pipeline stack
Lacks demonstrated experience with distributed systems, fault tolerance, or real-time traffic integration
